jcr:content.jcr:description: AbbVie’s mission is to discover and deliver innovative medicines and solutions that address complex health issues and enhance people's lives.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Who We Are
jcr:content.ctaAltText: Learn more about who we are
jcr:content.description: But it’s more than what we discover—it’s how we get there.
jcr:content.title: We create medicines and solutions

text.text: A team of people creating medicines and solutions that put impact first: for patients, communities and our world.

text_751835628.text: At AbbVie, our people are dedicated to putting patients at the center of everything we do. Every breakthrough, every innovation, and every step forward is inspired by the real lives we touch—working together to improve health and bring hope to individuals and families around the world. Get to know the passionate people who make up AbbVie and the difference we strive to make, one patient at a time.

title.jcr:title: Driven by science, united by purpose

text.text: Our scientists, researchers and doctors? Inspired by real stories.

teaser.jcr:description: AbbVie’s mission is to discover and deliver innovative medicines and solutions that address complex health issues and enhance people's lives.
teaser.jcr:title: Meeting the needs of our times

video_copy_copy_copy.descriptiveIframeTitle: Play video to learn more about AbbVie
video_copy_copy_copy.title: We are AbbVie

text.text: Every solution starts with the patient’s perspective, because transformative medicines only matter when they are safe, effective and accessible to everyone who needs them.

text_copy.text: We are making significant advancements with a robust pipeline of potential new medicines as we look to find the treatments of tomorrow.
We are driven by our compassion for people, commitment to innovation and inclusion, service to the community and uncompromising integrity.

teaser_copy.jcr:description: Our leaders’ vision and expertise guide our teams, while their commitment to patients fuels our culture.
teaser_copy.jcr:title: Our mission to improve lives starts at the top

text_copy.text: people treated by AbbVie’s products every year
countries where products help people and patients

text_copy_copy_copy.text:
AbbVie was founded in 2013 when we became a separate company from Abbott. Our name represents a proud connection to that legacy.

Since the beginning, our mission hasn't wavered. Our combination of focused innovation and commercial scale brings differentiated products to market that benefit patients, customers and health care providers.
